name: coderail
description: North-Star Kernel, CodeRail Coordinate, task/handoff/harness/trace skills for AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Keep AI coding aligned, test-gated, handoff-ready, and traceable.
interface.longDescription: A workflow kit for AI coding agents. It adds a North-Star Kernel, the CodeRail Coordinate (Goal/Task/Scope/Verify/Stop/Persist), task contracts, execution batches, harness gates, handoff discipline, asset boundaries, a lightweight trace graph, and drift checks without loading a long governance manual every turn.
defaultPrompt: Use CodeRail to align this feature before coding.
Use CodeRail to create a task contract with a CodeRail Coordinate and run the done gate.
